description: Create a professional map layout of the world countries using the 'countries_base' project and the 'Vista' view. The layout must include a view frame displaying the 'Vista' view, a title text element reading "World Countries Map", a legend, a scale bar, and a north arrow. Arrange these elements into a clean composition and export the map layout as a PNG image to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/world_map_layout.png.
